title: Audit + enforce trades_sports.db as single source of truth for dashboard data
objective: Guarantee every dashboard panel/endpoint reads historical trading data from trades_sports.db only, with documented exceptions for operational-state reads.
required_work: 1. Inventory every /api/* endpoint and classify its data source.
2. Identify violations: paper_trades.db reads, stale in-memory caches, log-only computations, silent fallbacks.
3. Fix each violation by switching to trades_sports.db reads.
4. Document exceptions where a non-DB source is correct (e.g., runtime/state.json for live bot state).
acceptance_criteria: No endpoint reads paper_trades.db for historical trade data
Every violation is either fixed or documented with reasoning
Dashboard renders the same numbers post-fix (no regression in correctness)
verification: Confirm dashboard renders without error post-change
grep for paper_trades.db in dashboard code shows zero reads
